heading: Duration of grant
label: 1101c Duration of grant
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was classified to prior to the general amendment of this subchapter by .section 504 of Pub. L. 89–329section 1102c of this titlePub. L. 105–244Another prior was classified to prior to repeal by .section 504 of Pub. L. 89–329section 1091c of this titlePub. L. 94–482

Amendments2006—Subsec. (a). reenacted heading without change and amended text generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows:Pub. L. 109–292“(1) .—The Secretary may award a grant to a Hispanic-serving institution under this subchapter for 5 years.In general“(2) .—A Hispanic-serving institution shall not be eligible to secure a subsequent 5-year grant award under this subchapter until 2 years have elapsed since the expiration of the institution’s most recent 5-year grant award under this subchapter, except that for the purpose of this subsection a grant under shall not be considered a grant under this subchapter.”Waitout periodsection 1103c(a) of this title

children.heading: Award period
children.label: a Award period
children.text: The Secretary may award a grant to a Hispanic-serving institution under this subchapter for 5 years.

children.heading: Planning grants
children.label: b Planning grants
children.text: Notwithstanding subsection (a), the Secretary may award a grant to a Hispanic-serving institution under this subchapter for a period of 1 year for the purpose of preparation of plans and applications for a grant under this subchapter.
